news.title: Paper accepted at SIGGRAPH 2025
news.description: Our work on topology optimization of differentiable microstructures has been accepted at SIGGRAPH 2025.

news.title: New graduate student joined the lab
news.description: Welcome to our research group! We look forward to exploring structural design together.

news.title: Paper published in Advanced Science
news.description: Our paper on near-isotropic, extreme-stiffness metamaterial sequences has been published in Advanced Science.

news.title: Invited talk at CAD/Graphics 2024
news.description: Gave an invited talk on GPU-accelerated topology optimization at CAD/Graphics 2024 conference.

news.title: Research grant awarded
news.description: Received funding from NSFC for research on AI-driven microstructure design.

news.title: Paper accepted at CMAME
news.description: Our work on 2D differentiable microstructures has been accepted by Computer Methods in Applied Mechanics and Engineering.

news.title: Summer school announcement
news.description: Organizing topology optimization section for USTC Summer School on Computer Graphics 2024.

news.title: Collaboration with TU Delft
news.description: Started new collaboration project with Prof. Jun Wu's group at TU Delft on advanced manufacturing.
